news.title:
Escorts Kubota secures 154-acre land from YEIDA for a new plant.
Shares rose 2% to Rs 2,928; no financial details disclosed for the project.
news.summary:

news.title:
Escorts Kubota Ltd reported 22.1% growth in domestic tractor sales, totaling 9,725 units in Feb 2026.
Construction equipment sales rose 4.8% YoY to 588 units; positive trends driven by govt spending and project awards.
news.summary:
Escorts Kubota Ltd reported 22.1% growth in domestic tractor sales, totaling 9,725 units in Feb 2026.
Construction equipment sales rose 4.8% YoY to 588 units; positive trends driven by govt spending and project awards.

news.title:
Construction Equipment retail sales dropped 21% YoY in Jan 2026 due to monsoon, slower infra push.
All 12 manufacturers, including JCB, Escorts Kubota, and Action Construction, showed declines per FADA data.
news.summary:
Construction Equipment retail sales dropped 21% YoY in Jan 2026 due to monsoon, slower infra push.
All 12 manufacturers, including JCB, Escorts Kubota, and Action Construction, showed declines per FADA data.

news.title:
Escorts Kubota expects domestic tractor sector to hit 11.5 lakh units this fiscal year.
Export volumes forecasted for double-digit growth but slower than past rates.
news.summary:
Escorts Kubota expects domestic tractor sector to hit 11.5 lakh units this fiscal year.
Export volumes forecasted for double-digit growth but slower than past rates.

news.title:
January 2026 tractor sales rose 45% YoY, driven by strong domestic demand.
Domestic sales grew 28% while exports increased 17%, per Tractor Association data.
news.summary:
January 2026 tractor sales rose 45% YoY, driven by strong domestic demand.
Domestic sales grew 28% while exports increased 17%, per Tractor Association data.

news.title:
Escorts Kubota's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹4.38B from ₹3.35B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 13.45% from 11.41% YoY, showcasing growth.
news.summary:
Escorts Kubota's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹4.38B from ₹3.35B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 13.45% from 11.41% YoY, showcasing growth.

news.title: Escorts Kubota to review Q3 results on February 10.
news.summary: Escorts Kubota to review Q3 results on February 10.

news.title:
Escorts Kubota Ltd announces retirement of Mr. Gurmeet Singh Grewal, Chief Officer, Tractor Business Division, effective Jan 31, 2026.
Mr. Rajan Chugh assumes the role, adding to his current responsibilities as Chief Officer, Agri Solutions Business Division.
news.summary:
Escorts Kubota Ltd announces retirement of Mr. Gurmeet Singh Grewal, Chief Officer, Tractor Business Division, effective Jan 31, 2026.
Mr. Rajan Chugh assumes the role, adding to his current responsibilities as Chief Officer, Agri Solutions Business Division.

news.title:
Indian auto sector ends 2025 strong with YoY growth, driven by macroeconomic improvements and rural positivity: ACMIIL.
Key factors include GST rationalisation, lower financing rates, and better affordability sustaining demand post-festive season.
news.summary:
Indian auto sector ends 2025 strong with YoY growth, driven by macroeconomic improvements and rural positivity: ACMIIL.
Key factors include GST rationalisation, lower financing rates, and better affordability sustaining demand post-festive season.

news.title:
Escorts Kubota's tractor sales rose 38.5% YoY in Dec 2025, with domestic sales up 36.1% and exports growing 64.3%.
Construction equipment sales fell 7% YoY to 812 units in Dec 2025, impacted by prior pre-buying and industry challenges.
news.summary:
Escorts Kubota's tractor sales rose 38.5% YoY in Dec 2025, with domestic sales up 36.1% and exports growing 64.3%.
Construction equipment sales fell 7% YoY to 812 units in Dec 2025, impacted by prior pre-buying and industry challenges.

news.title:
Escorts Kubota Ltd schedules investor meeting with Enam Asset Mgmt on Dec 15, 2025, via virtual video.
Investor presentation available on company website; no unpublished sensitive info to be disclosed.
news.summary:
Escorts Kubota Ltd schedules investor meeting with Enam Asset Mgmt on Dec 15, 2025, via virtual video.

news.title:
India's auto sector may see 10% growth in FY26 due to GST cuts, rural demand, and strong capex. Tractors, 2Ws, CVs are projected to grow.
OEMs like Maruti Suzuki, Hyundai have BUY ratings. Component makers like Bharat Forge, Balkrishna to benefit from global market stabilization.
news.summary:
India's auto sector may see 10% growth in FY26 due to GST cuts, rural demand, and strong capex. Tractors, 2Ws, CVs are projected to grow.
OEMs like Maruti Suzuki, Hyundai have BUY ratings. Component makers like Bharat Forge, Balkrishna to benefit from global market stabilization.

news.title:
SML Mahindra surged 5% to Rs 3198.2 as November sales rose 102% YoY.
The company sold 1,087 units in Nov 2025, up from 539 units a year ago.
news.summary:

Export tractor sales surged 87.7% to 458 units, while construction equipment sales fell 6% to 452 units.

The rise reflects strong financials, favorable sector trends, and investor confidence.

news.title:

Sales increased by 45.5% to Rs 567.32 crore compared to Q2 FY24.
